title: Accessibility - Large Text
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app screens display text truncation or layout issues when Android Large Text accessibility setting is enabled at maximum
steps: 1. On the Android device, go to System Settings → Accessibility → Text and Display → Font Size (or Large Text) and enable the option, then drag the slider to the maximum size.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the Home screen for any text truncation, overlapping, or layout breakage.
4. Navigate to Device Settings by tapping on a connected Poly device.
5. Observe the Device Settings screen for text display issues.
6. Navigate to Audio Settings → [Feature] (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) and observe the screen.
7. Navigate to the Notifications screen and observe.
8. Navigate to the Account screen and observe.
9. If applicable, trigger a DFU (Device Firmware Update) screen and observe.
10. If applicable, trigger an Onboarding or Quick Guide flow and observe.
expected: All app screens (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, Account, DFU screens, Onboarding/Quick Guides) display enlarged text properly without any truncation, overlapping, or layout issues.
